title: Peppermint Frappé
writer: Rafael Azcona, Angelino Fons, Carlos Saura
actors: Geraldine Chaplin, José Luis López Vázquez, Alfredo Mayo
plot: Julian, a middle-aged single doctor, meets his childhood friend Pablo again. The latter is back from Africa and has just married a beautiful young blonde, Elena. Julian falls in love with her and tries to seduce her, but she mocki...
